results.rendered_html: avighna (3. a + vi˚) adj. keine Störung —, keine Unterbrechung erleidend: avighnaṃ kriyatāṃ sarvaṃ kimarthaṃ hi vilambayate  R. 1,73,15 . avighnaṃ gaccha panthānam 3,12,11 . avighnakriyā  ŚĀK. 13,23 . — n. subst. Ungestörtheit, Abwesenheit jedes Hindernisses: avighnamastu te  RAGH. 1,91 . avighnena ungestört, ohne Hinderniss  R. 1,20,4 . 21,8 . 4,38,8 . avighnakaraṇavrata  VĀRĀHA-P. _in_ Verz. d. B. H. No. 485. fg.

results.rendered_html:
avighna a. Unobstructed, free from impediments; ˚kriyopalaṃbhāya  Ś. 1. 
— ghnaṃ Freedom from obstacle or impediment, welfare (this word is usually neuter, though vighna is m.); sādhayāmyahamavighnamastu te  R. 11. 91 ; avighnamastu te stheyāḥ piteva dhuri putriṇāṃ 1. 91 ; avighnamastu sāvitryāḥ pradāne duhitustava  Mb.
